titleStmt.title: SII 15.266: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 266. (B.K. No. 71 of 1928-29.) BĪḶGI, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On another stone in the same place.
This record in Marāṭhi language and Nāgarī characters, is another version of the above inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastubisirastubicadracāmaracārave trailokyanagarāraṁbhe mu
hastaṁbhāya śaṁbhave . svasti śrī nrapaśālivāhanaśake 1526 prava
rtamāne krodhināmasaṁvatsare māghamāse śuklapakṣe dvitīyāṁ bhārgavāsareṁ dha
niṣṭhānakṣatre varvānanāma yoge rājyādhipati Ībharāima Ā
dilaśāhābina AliĀdalaśāhā khānā vajira khāna Ali
khāna yākutakhānayāsi samata bilagi mokāsāasatā khaṁḍe
rāu timāji śaunakagotri samatamajakurice ṭhāṇe hote yāṇe
Āpuleṁ kaṣṭadravyavecunu paravupakārākāraṇe bilagi grāma
paścimadhāge vāvi bāṁdhale śake 1525 paṁdharāse paṁcavisa pra
vartamāte śobhakrattunāmasaṁvatsare Adhika Āsāḍhamāse su
klapakṣe poṁrnimā caṁdravāṁra ghaṭikā Aṭhāvisa mulanakṣatre kupa
Āraṁbha kele yeka varuṣa sātamāsa yokuṇisadivasa pari
yaṁtara kāma ghetale bāvi sidhda jāhāli hela nāṁdhale yāsi A
rdha cāvara bhumi Aṇi malā Ināma di(dha)le Ase yāsi koṇiĪ
khilakari dvatayi hidu Asetesi gaḍadho musadvamānāsi
nākṛta (mu)ṭāvana pharitasula Ase . śubhaṁ bhavatu . kruṣṇārpaṇamastu
yāvatiṣṭhati caṁdrārkau yāvatiṣṭhati medini tāvadrakṣaṁtu kūpaṁ ca viśve
ṣā naravallabhā . © . svadatādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradatānu para
datāpahāreṇa svadataṁ nisphalaṁ bhavet . 2 . kupa saṁpurna jāhālā
Digital edition of SII 15.266 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
